Baseline NLPD=1.4999, non-centered worse (1.5014). Trying t-likelihood since some groups show high variance. nu estimated from data to allow heavy tails.

notes: Heteroscedastic hierarchical model with group-specific variances
rationale: Baseline NLPD=1.4999; t-likelihood (1.5035) and non-centered (1.5014) both worse. Trying group-specific within-group variances since groups clearly differ in spread (e.g., group 4 vs group 5)
